Class UpdateQuery

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.UpdateQuery
public class UpdateQuery extends Object
Defines an update request.
Author:
Rizwan Idrees, Mohsin Husen, Peter-Josef Meisch, Farid Faoudi
